---
title: "Cartilage circadian processing"
output: html_document
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(STRINGdb)
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse", "cartilage_circ"))
```


```{r load_prepare_cartilage_data}
wt_data <- read.csv(file = "data/raw/wt_cartilage.csv")
ko_data <- read.csv(file = "data/raw/ko_cartilage.csv")

# combine the datasets based on the CycID column
combined <- full_join(wt_data, ko_data, by = "CycID")

#remove the gene.name.y column

combined <- combined[, -which(names(combined) == "gene_name.y")]

combined <- combined[rowMeans(combined[,3:26]) > 50,]



# Find all duplicates (both first and subsequent occurrences)
duplicates <- combined$gene_name.x[duplicated(combined$gene_name.x) | duplicated(combined$gene_name.x, fromLast = TRUE)]

# Subset the data frame to include only rows with duplicate gene names
duplicates_df <- combined[combined$gene_name.x %in% duplicates, c("gene_name.x", "CycID")]

redundant <- c("ENSMUSG00000096262",
"ENSMUSG00000051412",
"ENSMUSG00000095742",
"ENSMUSG00000063897",
"ENSMUSG00000095041",
"ENSMUSG00000079834",
"ENSMUSG00000053935",
"ENSMUSG00000073617",
"ENSMUSG00000099250",
"ENSMUSG00000099021",
"ENSMUSG00000003178",
"ENSMUSG00000074661",
"ENSMUSG00000045365",
"ENSMUSG00000090663",
"ENSMUSG00000095832",
"ENSMUSG00000074140")

# remove rows with redundant gene names

combined <- combined[!combined$CycID %in% redundant,]

# Ensure there are no leading/trailing spaces in the CycID column
combined$CycID <- trimws(combined$CycID)


# change gene name corresponding to CycID

combined$gene_name.x[combined$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000033083"] <- "Tbc1d4"

print(combined$gene_name.x[combined$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000033083"])

combined$gene_name.x[combined$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000078941"] <- "Ak6"

print(combined$gene_name.x[combined$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000078941"])

wt_data_rain <- combined[, 3:14]
row.names(wt_data_rain) <- combined$CycID

ko_data_rain <- combined[, 15:26]
row.names(ko_data_rain) <- combined$CycID

column_names <- c( "ZT_18_1", "ZT_22_1", "ZT_02_1", "ZT_06_1", "ZT_10_1", "ZT_14_1", "ZT_18_2", "ZT_22_2", "ZT_02_2", "ZT_06_2", "ZT_10_2", "ZT_14_2")
colnames(wt_data_rain) <- column_names
colnames(ko_data_rain) <- column_names

# order columns alphabetically
wt_data_rain <- wt_data_rain[, order(colnames(wt_data_rain))]
ko_data_rain <- ko_data_rain[, order(colnames(ko_data_rain))]
```


```{r run_rain_cartilage}

wt_RAIN <- rain(t(wt_data_rain), deltat=4, period=24, measure.sequence = c(2,2,2,2,2,2),
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent", adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling, longitudinal can be used for cell culture
ko_RAIN <- rain(t(ko_data_rain), deltat=4, period=24, measure.sequence = c(2,2,2,2,2,2),
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "independent", adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling, longitudinal can be used for cell culture

p_values_wt <- wt_RAIN$pVal

wt_RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values_wt, method = "BH")

p_values_ko <- ko_RAIN$pVal

ko_RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values_ko, method = "BH")
```


```{r merge_rain_results}
#create a new column "CycID" from row names in wt_RAIN
wt_RAIN$CycID <- rownames(wt_RAIN)

wt_data$gene_name[wt_data$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000033083"] <- "Tbc1d4"
wt_data$gene_name[wt_data$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000078941"] <- "Ak6"


wt_cart_circ <- right_join(wt_data, wt_RAIN, by = "CycID") 


write.csv(wt_cart_circ, file = "results/tables/wt_cartilage_circ.csv", row.names = F)

ko_RAIN$CycID <- rownames(ko_RAIN)

ko_data$gene_name[ko_data$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000033083"] <- "Tbc1d4"
ko_data$gene_name[ko_data$CycID == "ENSMUSG00000078941"] <- "Ak6"
ko_cart_circ <- inner_join(ko_data, ko_RAIN, by = "CycID")

write.csv(ko_cart_circ, file = "results/tables/ko_cartilage_circ.csv", row.names = F)
```




## App RDS processing (from circ_cartilage_timecourse_bodyclocks.rmd)

```{r annotate_wt_cartilage}
# Load WT data
data <- read.csv("results/tables/wt_cartilage_circ.csv")



# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection with retry/fallback handling.
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = data$CycID,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "cartilage_wt_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$preferred_symbol), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(data, gene_info, by.x = "CycID", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
# If preffered_symbol is NA, copy gene_name to preferred_symbol
merged$preferred_symbol <- ifelse(is.na(merged$preferred_symbol) | merged$preferred_symbol == "", 
                                   merged$gene_name, 
                                   merged$preferred_symbol)

# Re-save wt_cartilage_circ.csv now that annotation columns are available
write.csv(merged, file = "results/tables/wt_cartilage_circ.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$CycID
enrichment_background_genes <- unique(wt_RAIN$CycID)
```

```{r build_wt_string_network}
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$CycID,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")

enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
  foreground_genes = gene_list,
  tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
  species_id = 10090
)

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  include_enrichment = FALSE
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data

phase_colors <- c("4" = "orange", "8" = "yellow", "12" = "red", "16" = "purple", "20" = "navy", "24" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors
)
enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_backgrounds = enrichment_backgrounds,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors
)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
cluster_data_export <- cluster_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(preferredNames = vapply(preferredNames, paste, character(1), collapse = ","))
write.csv(cluster_data_export, file = "results/tables/cartilage_enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ",
  prefix = "cartilage"
)
save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_background_bundle,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ",
  prefix = "cartilage"
)

```


```{r build_cartilage_display_table}
# Process data frame for plotting in bodyclocks shiny app
dt_wt <- merged
dt_ko <- read.csv("results/tables/ko_cartilage_circ.csv")

dt_wt <- dt_wt %>%
  mutate(ZT2 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_9AM_3", "WT_9AM_2"))),
         ZT6 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_1PM_1", "WT_1PM_2"))),
         ZT10 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_5PM_3", "WT_5PM_2"))),
         ZT14 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_9PM_3", "WT_9PM_2"))),
         ZT18 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_1AM_2", "WT_1AM_3"))),
         ZT22 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("WT_5AM_2", "WT_5AM_3")))
  )

dt_ko <- dt_ko %>%
  mutate(ZT2 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_9AM_3", "KO_9AM_2"))),
         ZT6 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_1PM_1", "KO_1PM_2"))),
         ZT10 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_5PM_3", "KO_5PM_2"))),
         ZT14 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_9PM_3", "KO_9PM_2"))),
         ZT18 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_1AM_2", "KO_1AM_3"))),
         ZT22 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("KO_5AM_2", "KO_5AM_3")))
  )

means_wt <- dt_wt[c("ZT2", "ZT6", "ZT10", "ZT14", "ZT18", "ZT22")]
means_ko <- dt_ko[c("ZT2", "ZT6", "ZT10", "ZT14", "ZT18", "ZT22")]

min_val_wt <- apply(means_wt, 1, min)
max_val_wt <- apply(means_wt, 1, max)

min_val_ko <- apply(means_ko, 1, min)
max_val_ko <- apply(means_ko, 1, max)


WT_Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val_wt / min_val_wt)
WT_Amp_fc <- max_val_wt / min_val_wt

KO_Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val_ko / min_val_ko)
KO_Amp_fc <- max_val_ko / min_val_ko

wt_dt <- cbind(dt_wt, WT_Amp_fc_log2, WT_Amp_fc)
ko_dt <- cbind(dt_ko, KO_Amp_fc_log2, KO_Amp_fc)

merged_wt_ko <- merge(wt_dt, ko_dt, by = "gene_name", suffixes = c("_wt", "_ko"))

display_dt <- merged_wt_ko %>%
  dplyr::select(preferred_symbol, description, pVal_wt, BH.Q_wt, pVal_ko, BH.Q_ko, WT_Amp_fc_log2, KO_Amp_fc_log2, phase_wt, phase_ko) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol) %>% #gene names have to be in column labeled symbol
  arrange(BH.Q_wt) 

save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ/cartilage_display_dt.rds")
```


```{r build_wt_plot_data}

wt_plotting <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", "WT_9AM_2", "WT_1PM_1", "WT_5PM_2", "WT_9PM_2", "WT_1AM_3", "WT_5AM_3", "WT_9AM_3", "WT_1PM_2", "WT_5PM_3", "WT_9PM_3", "WT_1AM_2", "WT_5AM_2"
)]
new_col_names <- c("Gene", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12")
colnames(wt_plotting) <- new_col_names

qval_df <- merged[c("preferred_symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_qval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_qval_names

wt_plotting2 <- pivot_longer(wt_plotting, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "mean")
wt_plotting2 <- inner_join(wt_plotting2, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(wt_plotting2, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ/cartilage_wt_data.rds")


```


```{r annotate_ko_cartilage}
## Same processing for the KO cartilage data
# Load KO data
data <- read.csv("results/tables/ko_cartilage_circ.csv")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = data$CycID,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "cartilage_ko_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$preferred_symbol), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(data, gene_info, by.x = "CycID", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
# If preffered_symbol is NA, copy gene_name to preferred_symbol
merged$preferred_symbol <- ifelse(is.na(merged$preferred_symbol) | merged$preferred_symbol == "", 
                                   merged$gene_name, 
                                   merged$preferred_symbol)

# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)


# Get list of gene symbols for STRING API
#gene_list <- nodes_data$symbol

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$CycID
enrichment_background_genes <- unique(ko_RAIN$CycID)

# Create the mapping using your existing data
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$CycID,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")
```
```{r build_ko_string_network}
enrichment_backgrounds <- get_string_enrichment_backgrounds(
  foreground_genes = gene_list,
  tested_genes = enrichment_background_genes,
  species_id = 10090
)

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  include_enrichment = FALSE
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- enrichment_backgrounds$backgrounds$all_string$cluster_data

phase_colors <- c("4" = "orange", "8" = "yellow", "12" = "red", "16" = "purple", "20" = "navy", "24" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors
)
enrichment_background_bundle <- build_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_backgrounds = enrichment_backgrounds,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors
)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ",
  prefix = "ko_cart"
)
save_string_enrichment_background_bundle(
  enrichment_background_bundle,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ",
  prefix = "ko_cart"
)
```

```{r build_ko_plot_data}
ko_plotting <- merged[, c("preferred_symbol", "KO_9AM_2", "KO_1PM_1", "KO_5PM_2", "KO_9PM_2", "KO_1AM_3", "KO_5AM_3", "KO_9AM_3", "KO_1PM_2", "KO_5PM_3", "KO_9PM_3", "KO_1AM_2", "KO_5AM_2"
)]
colnames(ko_plotting) <- new_col_names

qval_Ko_df <- merged[c("preferred_symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_qval_Ko_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_Ko_df) <- new_qval_Ko_names

ko_plotting2 <- pivot_longer(ko_plotting, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "mean")
ko_plotting2 <- inner_join(ko_plotting2, qval_Ko_df, by = "Gene")

save_rds_checked(ko_plotting2, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ/cartilage_ko_data.rds")
```
